## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (Detekt)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have followed Conventional Commits for my commit messages
- [ ] I have rebased my branch on the latest main

### Documentation
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested on a physical device

### Security
- [ ] I have verified that no sensitive data is hardcoded
- [ ] I have checked for potential security vulnerabilities

### Build
- [ ] The app builds successfully in debug mode
- [ ] The app builds successfully in release mode
- [ ] ProGuard rules are updated if needed

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project architecture (Clean Architecture + MVVM)
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate
- [ ] Resource management is proper (no memory leaks)
- [ ] Security considerations are addressed
- [ ] Performance is acceptable
- [ ] Tests are comprehensive
